notable_quotes: We just got the hammer, now we just have to find our way back to wherever we place them. I forget where that is because it's been a bit.
Does that mean we're gonna have to retrace our steps again? Because we hadn't saved after grabbing that... probably.
Please say it's not doing this shit again. It didn't give me the 'Start Game', it gave me the 'Downgrade' button again.
I unenable it, I leave Baldur's Gate all together... then we go into my files... navigate to your local Baldur's Gate 3 folder... go through my files...
priority_actions: Add an autosave trigger to the acquisition of the Dawnmaster's Crest and similar quest-critical items.
Fix the Mod Manager file lock bug that triggers the 'Process cannot access the file' error at 08:58.
Update the Mod Manager UI to explicitly state the required version number (e.g., v1.2 vs v1.3) during a mismatch.
Improve party AI jump-following to reduce the 4+ retry loops seen in vertical navigation at 03:13.
Add a 'Repair/Force Sync' button in the Mod Manager to prevent players from needing to manually delete .pak files in AppData.
top_highlight: A file access error prevents the mod from updating while the game process is active.
